positive: A stylized, abstract, and highly detailed illustration of a cosmic forest landscape. The scene features towering, bioluminescent flora with crystalline structures, intertwined with gentle, stylized nebula clouds and glowing constellations. The color palette should be deep indigo, vibrant teal, electric violet, and gold accents. Focus on strong silhouettes and intricate geometric patterns in the foliage and celestial bodies. Composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for repeating textile patterns, emphasizing symmetry and visual balance. Cinematic, hyper-detailed vector style, glowing ethereal light source, high contrast, clean lines, print-ready.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, logo, artifact, poor anatomy, extra limbs, copyright, low detail, muted colors, realistic photo, graffiti, cartoon, messy
